Key.English: Set AI Skill levels per faction by presets or custom settings
Key.Chinesesimp: 通过预设或自定义设置设置每个派系的人工智能技能等级

Key.English: Only one AI SKILL module allowed
Key.Chinesesimp: 只允许一个人工智能技能模块
启用人工智能技能模组调试

Key.English: Faction units will be given recruit skill level. Separate multiple factions with commas, no spaces, no quotes — e.g. BLU_F,OPF_F
Key.Chinesesimp: 派系单位将获得招募技能等级,用逗号分隔多个派系(BLU_F,OPF_F,IND_F,BLU_G_F)

Key.English: Faction units will be given regular skill level. Separate multiple factions with commas, no spaces, no quotes — e.g. BLU_F,OPF_F
Key.Chinesesimp: 派系单位将获得常规技能等级,用逗号分隔多个派系(BLU_F,OPF_F,IND_F,BLU_G_F)

Key.English: Faction units will be given veteran skill level. Separate multiple factions with commas, no spaces, no quotes — e.g. BLU_F,OPF_F
Key.Chinesesimp: 派系单位将获得资深技能等级,用逗号分隔多个派系(BLU_F,OPF_F,IND_F,BLU_G_F)

Key.English: Faction units will be given expert skill level. Separate multiple factions with commas, no spaces, no quotes — e.g. BLU_F,OPF_F
Key.Chinesesimp: 派系单位将获得专家技能等级,用逗号分隔多个派系(BLU_F,OPF_F,IND_F,BLU_G_F)

Key.English: Factions that will receive the custom skill values below. Separate multiple factions with commas, no spaces, no quotes — e.g. BLU_F,OPF_F
Key.Chinesesimp: 将具有以下自定义技能设置的派系,用逗号分隔多个派系(BLU_F,OPF_F,IND_F,BLU_G_F)

Key.English: Minimum general ability (0.0–1.0). Combined with maximum to give each unit a random ability value within the range. Lower = weaker AI overall.
Maximum general ability (0.0–1.0). Combined with minimum to give each unit a random ability value within the range. Higher = stronger AI overall.
How accurately the unit aims (0.0–1.0). Lower values cause more scatter. Works alongside Aim Shake and Aim Speed.
How much the unit's aim wobbles between shots (0.0–1.0). Higher values increase weapon sway. Works alongside Aim Accuracy.
How quickly the unit acquires and tracks targets (0.0–1.0). Higher values mean faster target acquisition.
Unit stamina and fatigue resistance (0.0–1.0). Higher values allow the unit to run longer before becoming fatigued.
Maximum detection range multiplier (0.0–1.0). Higher values allow the unit to spot enemies at greater distances.
How quickly the unit spots a detected enemy (0.0–1.0). Lower values mean the unit is slower to confirm and react to contacts.
Unit willingness to advance and engage under fire (0.0–1.0). Lower values make units more likely to fall back or suppress rather than assault.
How easily the unit will flee
Key.Chinesesimp: 单位会逃跑的难易程度

Key.English: How quickly the unit attempts to reload after firing (0.0–1.0). Higher values reduce reload time.
Quality of the unit's command decisions when acting as a group leader (0.0–1.0). Higher values improve squad-level tactics and target prioritisation.
Overall AI skill multiplier (0.0–1.0). Acts as a global modifier affecting all other skill traits. Set lower to broadly weaken a faction without adjusting individual values.
